name: Linear MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server that integrates with Linear's issue tracking system, allowing LLMs to create, update, search, and comment on Linear issues through standardized MCP tools and resources.
use_cases: Creating and updating Linear issues from an AI assistant
Searching and filtering issues by team, status, priority, or assignee
Querying organization and user context from Linear
not_for: New projects - this server is officially deprecated
Production use requiring ongoing maintenance and updates
Advanced Linear features like projects, cycles, or roadmaps
best_when: You needed a quick community-built Linear MCP integration before the official one existed.
avoid_when: Always - this is deprecated. Use the official Linear remote MCP server at https://mcp.linear.app/sse instead.

auth.notes: Requires LINEAR_API_KEY environment variable. Key obtained from Linear team settings dashboard.

pricing.notes: MIT licensed. Requires a Linear account (Linear itself has paid plans).

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: No documented error handling patterns. Basic MCP server with minimal error guidance.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: No documentation on idempotency. Creating issues is not idempotent by default.
known_agent_gotchas: Deprecated - will not receive updates or bug fixes
Official Linear MCP server supersedes this entirely
Only 19 commits total suggesting limited maturity
No error handling documentation for agents
